_doc: Saved voice setups for /demo-video. Each preset bundles an ElevenLabs voice_id + model + voice_settings (incl. pace) that we've auditioned and liked. An audio config can set "voice_preset": "<name>" instead of inline voice_id/voice_settings; any inline keys in the config override the preset. Add a new preset by auditioning a voice, then saving the winning setup here. `default` names the preset used when a config sets neither a preset nor an inline voice.

ava.profile: Young female, South African accent, conversational/classy. Warm and expressive.
ava.notes: First voice we locked (2026-06-02). Speed 1.0 read better than 1.05/0.95. Good narrated-explainer default.

danielle.profile: Calm, polished female, South African accent, narrative/storytelling tone.
